purpose: Migrate useThemeStyles.ts, ThemeIcon.tsx, and profile.tsx off the S2->S4 transitional compat fields (visualStyle, labelKey, descriptionKey, backgroundImage) and onto direct manifest reads (treatments.*, contentSurface, label/description, colors.backgroundImage), remove the 10 per-theme i18n.ts keys, and tear down the compat bridge in themes/index.ts so AppThemeDefinition collapses to the literal ThemeManifest alias architecture.md's Registry seam contract always described as the epic end state.

public_api.name: useThemeStyles()
public_api.description: Six-field return { cardStyle, surfaceStyle, navStyle, buttonStyle, contentPanelStyle, bannerDecorStyle } (AC10/AC-UX-1). visualStyle and isFunTheme removed. Thin wrapper around the new exported pure computeThemeStyles(definition) for testability without a React render tree.

public_api.name: computeThemeStyles(definition)
public_api.description: New pure export (implementation seam, not in architecture.md's contract table) — looks up treatments.card/button/nav/surface/contentPanel in treatments/elevation.ts and treatments/patterns.ts, merges treatments.overrides, and builds bannerDecorStyle from treatments.banner. Same lookup path the hook uses at runtime; exists so per-theme byte-identical parity can be asserted against real manifest data without mocking React context.

public_api.name: ThemeIcon (component)
public_api.description: Unchanged props/behavior; internally resolves via manifest.treatments.iconSet against treatments/iconSets.ts's resolveIconId instead of a local ICON_MAP keyed by the removed visualStyle.

public_api.name: getThemeIconId(name, iconSet)
public_api.description: Signature changed from (name, visualStyle: string) to (name, iconSet: IconSetName) — no external callers existed (grep-confirmed), so this is a safe, non-breaking signature change within the story's scope.

public_api.name: themes/index.ts: AppThemeDefinition
public_api.description: Compat bridge torn down: pure alias, no visualStyle/labelKey/descriptionKey/backgroundImage. toCompatDefinition, ELEVATION_TO_VISUAL_STYLE, and the ThemeVisualStyle re-export are deleted.

public_api.name: themes/index.ts: listThemes(options)
public_api.description: New export (architecture.md Implementation Constraint 14 / spec.md §6.10). Excludes status:'hidden' themes by default. Re-exported through lib/theme.ts (profile.tsx's only allowed import path per Boundary Rules).

public_api.name: themes/index.ts: isThemeVisible(theme)
public_api.description: New export — the predicate listThemes() filters with (theme.status !== 'hidden'). Exported separately (not inlined) so the filtering branch can be exercised directly against a real-manifest-spread fixture, since none of the five migrated themes sets status:'hidden' today.

owned_data: the treatment-lookup + override-merge logic in useThemeStyles.ts's computeThemeStyles
the icon-set resolution call site in ThemeIcon.tsx
the label/description localization fallback logic (localizedThemeText) in profile.tsx
dependencies_allowed: profile.tsx -> lib/theme (APP_THEMES type via listThemes/AppThemeName, value listThemes)
themes/index.ts -> registry.generated (APP_THEMES, AppThemeName), buildChakraTheme (getChakraTheme), schema (type-only ThemeManifest)
dependencies_forbidden: useThemeStyles.ts -> registry.generated directly (must go via lib/theme -> index)
useThemeStyles.ts / ThemeIcon.tsx / profile.tsx / themes/index.ts -> schema.ts at runtime (type-only ThemeManifest import only; AC-BOUND-1)
Layout.tsx, pages/index.tsx edits (AC-UX-1 forbids; both remain byte-for-byte unchanged)
manifests, buildChakraTheme, treatments/*, the generator, storage.ts edits (S1/S3 own these; no genuine AC-UX-4 fix was needed here)
